{
    activeEarnOffers {
      earnOffers {
        backgroundImageUrl
        badgeCategory
        colorBackgroundLogoImageUrl
        campaignId
        campaignOfferId
        dealType
        displayName
        displaySubtitle
        displayTitle
        ownerDescription

          keyphraseCategoryNames

          campaignOfferId

          displaySubtitle
          displayTitle
          colorBackgroundLogoImageUrl
          ownerId
          ownerDescription

      }
    }
  }
